data.title: Perry Ellis tries new AI recommendations for its apparel online
data.description: The engine Perry Ellis is using comes from Syte, which has a AI solutions specially tailored to clothing and ecommerce.

data.title: Q&A: How AI helps make anti-fragile supply chains the new normal in 2025
data.description: Darcy MacClaren, chief revenue officer, SAP Digital Supply Chain, discusses how AI gives B2B companies information and tools like digital twins to build resilient supply chains.

data.title: Amazon faces labor strikes and safety allegations amid the holiday rush
data.description: A Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pension (HELP) Committee report led by Sen. Bernie Sanders has accused Amazon of prioritizing speed over worker safety in its warehouses.

data.title: 5 post-Cyber Monday online shopping trends
data.description: Consumer insights from Salesforce, Adobe and others indicate what shoppers have been doing this holiday season — especially after Cyber Monday — and what trends retailers should be aware of.

data.title: NorthSky Supply launches ecommerce platform for MRO Supplies
data.description: The digital-first B2B distributor based in The Woodlands, Texas, has launched a platform to provide maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) products to U.S. businesses.
